NAVAREA XIX 55/25
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  181830 UTC MAY 25
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
  
 72-29.94N 020-18.56E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 71-14.60N 022-15.00E COSL PROSPECTOR
 66-34.60N 006-05.60E DEEPSEA BOLLSTA
 66-05.50N 008-03.30E TRANSOCEAN ENCOURAGE
 65-30.80N 007-29.20E DEEPSEA YANTAI

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　51/25
